channel.title: Ml on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Ml on Systology

item.title: Model Serving & Inference
item.description: Principles for highly available production ML inference; utilizing immutable model registries, dynamic request micro-batching, safe canary rollouts, graceful fallback degradation, and efficient GPU memory management.

item.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Platform
item.description: A secure platform design for advanced federated learning pipelines; training models directly across edge devices without sharing raw telemetry, utilizing secure local aggregation and robust privacy safeguards.

item.title: AI/ML Workshop
item.description: A carefully curated set of practical, highly reproducible machine learning examples (PyTorch, Hugging Face, NumPy) featuring MPS-aware benchmarks and rigorous experiment hygiene for local hardware.

item.title: ML Experiments
item.description: Guidance for reproducible, resource-aware machine learning experiments; leveraging lightweight MLOps primitives, strict environment versioning, seed management, and rigorous, deterministic model evaluation protocols.

item.title: Ragchain
item.description: A comprehensive local RAG stack (ChromaDB + Ollama) designed for strictly private, reproducible retrieval and LLM inference; heavily focusing on hybrid retrieval strategies and index versioning.
